k6_system_recap: >>> RECAP: Back in Eldenrath, the hero met Luna, a wandering healer. Systematic thefts shook the village. Aria exposed Kael as a shadow guild member - but he stole for orphans. A fate choice split the group. Luna revealed disturbing parallels to her vanished homeland. A temporal micro-anomaly was detected on her.
k6_protag_entrance: What is this... The ground just drops away. Stairs leading into nothingness. This labyrinth must be ancient.
k6_system_scan: >>> Underground structure detected. Estimated depth: 400 meters. Magical signatures on all levels. Age: at least 3000 years. WARNING: Biosignatures detected in the depths.
k6_aldric_ancient: These symbols on the walls... I've never seen them in any book. Whoever built this - it was before our time. Long before.
k6_system_companion: >>> Companion analysis: Determining optimal partner for this mission based on past decisions...
k6_aria_ready: I'm going down there with you. After everything that happened... I want to be by your side.
k6_protag_aria_glad: I'm glad you're here, Aria. I couldn't have done this alone.
k6_aria_together: Together we can do anything. That's what I've learned.
k6_kael_ready: Hey, you don't think I'd let you march in there alone? Forget it.
k6_protag_kael_glad: Kael... Thank you. After everything that happened - that means a lot to me.
k6_kael_together: We're a team. Period. No matter what came before.
k6_protag_first_floor: The first level. Already swarming with creatures. They're... different. Deformed.
k6_system_enemies: >>> Contact: Mutated labyrinth dwellers. Magical corruption has altered their bodies. Weak points being marked.
k6_aldric_walls: The walls are pulsing. As if the labyrinth itself is alive. Fascinating... and unsettling at the same time.
k6_protag_treasure_spot: There - a chest. Sitting right in the middle of the corridor, like it was placed there. Too inviting, if you ask me.
k6_choice_open_chest: Open the chest. We need every resource we can get.
k6_choice_ignore_chest: Don't touch it. This screams trap.
k6_protag_gold: Ha! Gold! Quite a lot of it too... Wait, what's that clicking sound?
k6_system_trap: >>> WARNING: Trap mechanism activated. Poison needles detected. Evasive action recommended - too late.
k6_protag_trap_pain: Argh...! Poison. My arm is going numb. That was stupid of me.
k6_protag_ignore: No. It's too obvious. Keep moving.
k6_aria_praise: Smart choice. My scan shows three poison needle mechanisms in that chest. You wouldn't have survived if you had an allergic reaction.
k6_system_trap_avoided: >>> Trap bypassed. Sensors confirm: Triple poison needle system. Lethal dose for unprotected humanoids.
k6_protag_deeper: We need to go deeper. Each level gets darker... and the air grows thinner.
k6_aldric_symbols: These symbols are changing. They tell a story - of something imprisoned here. Something old. Something hungry.
k6_system_deeper: >>> Level 3 reached. Magical concentration rising exponentially. Biological signature in the depths growing stronger. Recommendation: Extreme caution.
k6_system_echo_detected: >>> TEMPORAL ANOMALY. Timeline fragmentation detected. Source: unknown. The walls... they remember.
k6_protag_echo_vision: What...?! I see... a campfire. People around me. Laughter. Warmth. But this isn't NOW - this was... before. Before everything.
k6_aria_echo_memory: That was... that was MY memory. But how? I'm a fragment, I shouldn't have any... Why does this feel so real?
k6_system_echo_rift: >>> CRITICAL ANOMALY. Time rift resonance: 87%. A rift in space. Behind it... a man. He's drawing runes. He's SCREAMING. The energy tears him apart —
k6_protag_echo_aldric: ALDRIC?! I see Aldric! He... he's sacrificing himself. The time magic rips him to pieces and he — he's SMILING. As if he knew...
k6_system_echo_warning: >>> Temporal echo ended. WARNING: These visions are not dreams. They are echoes of another timeline. A timeline that belonged to YOU. System integrity: 97%. Cause of destabilization... unclear.
k6_protag_creature_spot: Wait! There - in that cage. A creature, locked up. It's trembling.
k6_choice_free_creature: We free it. Nobody deserves to be locked up down here.
k6_choice_ignore_creature: We don't know what it is. It could be dangerous. Move on.
k6_protag_free_it: Hold still, little one. I'm opening the cage...
k6_luna_creature_happy: It's licking your hand! Look, its fur is glowing. That's a Light Elemental! It was imprisoned here to feed the darkness.
k6_system_creature_thanks: >>> Light Elemental freed. Passive healing aura activated. The creature appears to want to follow the protagonist. Affinity: Maximum.
k6_protag_leave_creature: I'm sorry. We can't take the risk.
k6_aria_creature_sad: It's crying. Can you hear that? That faint whimpering... I hope we made the right choice.
k6_protag_chamber: This chamber... It's enormous. The floor is vibrating. There's something here. Something massive.
k6_aldric_massive: By the light of the stars... Look at that. That creature - it has HEADS. Multiple. And every single one is staring at us.
k6_system_boss_warning: >>> RED ALERT. Labyrinth Hydra 'Thessara' identified. Level 18. Two combat phases. Element: Water. Weakness: Lightning. HP: 600. ATK: 45. DEF: 30. Prepare for combat IMMEDIATELY.
k6_rescue_kael_appears: Miss me?! I found the back entrance - and your screaming was hard to miss!
k6_protag_rescue_shock: You...! How did you find us?!
k6_aria_rescue_reaction: Kael...? You're here? I... Thank you.
k6_protag_victory: We did it! The Hydra is down! All united... as it should be.
k6_kael_sorry: Hey... About before. About everything. I'm sorry. I should have been honest. You're the only family I have.
k6_aria_forgive: I... wasn't fair either. I judged you without understanding your reasons. I'm sorry, Kael.
k6_protag_together_again: Together. The way it should be. No matter what comes - we face it as a team.
k6_aldric_inscription: Wait, everyone! Here on the wall, behind the Hydra's throne... An inscription! It's still glowing.
k6_protag_inscription: What does it say? Can you read it?
k6_aldric_devourer: 'When the Devourer awakens, the last veil falls. Time itself shall be its feast.' ...Devourer? Who or what is the Devourer?
k6_system_devourer: >>> 'Devourer'... My system is reporting... no. That can't be right. Error. ERROR. Database match: 0 results. But my core routines... are reacting. As if they KNOW this word. System integrity: 94%. Declining.
k6_nihilus_echo_whisper: Ah... you scratch at the surface of my timelines. How delightful. Keep scratching - but what lies beneath will devour you.
